sglang.title: [router] introduce dp worker abstraction
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The current SGLang router implementation has DP-aware (Data Parallel aware) logic throughout the Router code. To enable DP Aware routing in PD mode. A abstraction is required. The DP-aware functionality allows workers to handle data-parallel routing by injecting data_parallel_rank into re

sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
After #8552 was merged, I get this error AttributeError: 'FusedMoE' object has no attribute 'local_num_experts'. It should be num_local_experts instead.

sglang.title: Support OCP MXFP4 quantization on AMD GPUs
sglang.author: kkHuang-amd
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Co-author: @fxmarty-amd
Motivation
With the new instructions support on the new hardware platforms, AMD new GPUs can run the OCP MXFP4 computation in MoE and linear layers. Besides dynamic quantization from bf16/fp16 to mxfp4, this also supported the quark quantized mxfp4 static model.
Modifications

sglang.title: [CPU][sgl-kernel] biased_grouped_topk: fix correction_bias dtype to float32
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

#7825 has fixed the dtype of e_score_correction_bias to float32 instead of bfloat16. We need to fix the support in the topk kernel.
UT has been updated accordingly.

vllm.author: alyosha-swamy

Purpose
Fix Arcee model weight loading by implementing custom load_weights method that properly maps separate q_proj, k_proj, v_proj weights from HuggingFace checkpoints to the fused qkv_proj expected by LlamaAttention. Resolves "There is no module or parameter named 'model.layers.*.self_attn.k_proj

vllm.title: [Responses API] Ignore `store=True` and process the request by default
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A small fix for potentially better UX.
Instead of returning errors for requests with store = True, we ignore store and process the request anyway.
This might lead to better UX assuming that most users do not intend to actually store the response (i.e., their request's store=True just because it's th

vllm.title: [Bugfix][V1][P/D]Fix the uneven polling issue in the toy proxy for P2pNcclConnector
vllm.author: Abatom
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Using pop alters the original P/D instance order in the dictionary, and the round-robin selection of 1P1D relies on that order, which leads to uneven polling. After replacing pop with get, the unevenness issue has been fixed.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] V1 Fix the cursor leakage issue during request scheduling.
vllm.author: CLFutureX
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Background:  When iterating through running requests, if preemption occurs and the preempted request is before the current cursor req_index, subsequent requests will be missed during scheduling.
Solution: When the preempted request is determined to be before the current cursor req_index, adjust the

vllm.title: Optimize configuration access with LRU cache in custom ops
vllm.author: skyloevil
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Changes

Added get_cached_compilation_config() function with
@lru_cache(maxsize=1) to cache compilation config access
Added cache invalidation in set_current_vllm_config() context
manager to ensure cache freshness
Fixed code style (line length) issues

Benefits

Reduces repeated configuration lookup
